prompt: Customers have been complaining that our checkout page hangs for several seconds before completing. I grabbed a short client-side capture during one of the slow moments — it's at /sessions/sweet-trusting-darwin/mnt/pcap_analysis_sandbox/pcaps/eval-slow-app.pcap. Can you tell me what's going on and what to do about it? A written analysis I can hand to our network team would be ideal.

assertions.description: Report identifies a TCP zero-window event
Report cites specific frame numbers as evidence (at least 3)
Report includes at least one concrete tshark/display filter the reader could re-run
Report proposes concrete mitigation or next steps (not just 'monitor')
Output has a headed structure with TL;DR or executive summary plus findings
